case_title: STEVE SPRAGUE VS. GREYHOUND LINES, INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY SPRAGUE, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT GREYHOUND LINES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPRAGUE, STEVE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-18-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREYHOUND LINES, INC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPRAGUE, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREYHOUND LINES, INC $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT GREYHOUND LINES, INC
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GREYHOUND LINES, INC HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GREYHOUND LINES, INC ON JUN-09-2011 - DENIED. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
